rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §33.003, which governs parental consent for school district activities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district shall adopt guidelines to ensure that written consent is obtained from the parent, legal guardian, or person entitled to enroll the student under Section 25.001(j) for the student to participate in those activities for which the district requires parental consent.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns parental consent for student activities; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. No statutory or constitutional interaction.
